decisions_archive.what: Trust stability metric: CV-squared vs raw variance
decisions_archive.why: Scale-invariant; raw variance fails with dM 1-100 range

decisions_archive.what: Junction metric: symmetric vs asymmetric trust
decisions_archive.why: Asymmetric makes cross-metathesis eligibility depend on evaluation order

decisions_archive.what: Absorptive family creation: conditional vs unconditional
decisions_archive.chose: Unconditional (always create family on absorptive cross)
decisions_archive.why: Conditional guard silently skipped first-gen agents

decisions_archive.chose: Orientation card: MEMORY.md lean ~50 lines, buffer = single source of truth

decisions_archive.why: Respects user sovereignty over existing notes

decisions_archive.chose: Handoff-only at full-scan threshold, max 10 lines/cycle
decisions_archive.why: Autosave too expensive; full-scan = natural moment
Standalone sessions see stale status otherwise
